A_Chase.desc: This is the standard monster walking function which has to be used in the walking frames of a monster. Typically, it is used in an actor's "See" state or a custom equivalent.

A_SpawnItemEx.desc: Spawns an actor at the specified offset away from the calling actor, facing the given angle, and with the indicated velocity.

A_Log.desc: Logs a string to the console and displays it on the screen

A_LogInt.desc: Logs a number to the console and displays it on the screen
